name: docker ssh local setup
description: Start a local SSH server container for SSH/SFTP flows.

tasks.name: flowk-ssh
command:
apk add --no-cache openssh-server >/dev/null && mkdir -p /var/run/sshd && ssh-keygen -A >/dev/null && echo 'root:flowkpass' | chpasswd && printf '
PermitRootLogin yes
PasswordAuthentication yes
Subsystem sftp internal-sftp
' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config && /usr/sbin/sshd -D -p 2222

tasks.name: sleep sshd boot
tasks.description: Wait for the SSH server to accept connections.
